score_evidence.completeness: All required fields present: project_name, client_name, milestone_name (M5 — Construction Start Authorized), amount (36000 USD), due_date (2027-09-29), payment_instructions, currency (USD), running_total (180000 USD). Payment history for all 5 milestones M1–M5 included showing complete project fee schedule. Score 5.
score_evidence.accuracy: Invoice amount $36,000 USD matches exactly the M5 amount from Bruno's payment schedule (20% × $180,000 = $36,000). running_total $180,000 matches total architecture fee. payment_schedule_template correctly identified as public_civic 20/15/20/25/20. Score 5.
score_evidence.clarity: Payment instructions include bank transfer reference format. Score 4: CLABE and BANK_NAME are placeholders (TO BE CONFIGURED in .env) — client cannot pay without these details resolved. This is expected in test environment but is a gap in production readiness.
score_evidence.state_sync: Score 3 (simulated run — ASANA_UNAVAILABLE). Invoice issued after milestone trigger not confirmed via live Asana. payment_history shows all prior milestones as 'paid' which correctly reflects project-closed state.
score_evidence.timing: Invoice for M5 due 2027-09-29 — matches milestone_dates.M5_construction_start_authorized in project-schedule.json. Permit approved 2027-09-20, M5 invoice due 2027-09-29. Timing is correct (invoice after milestone trigger). Score 5.

decision_commentary: Strong invoice deliverable. This is the final M5 invoice — running_total confirms all $180,000 USD has been invoiced. Payment history for M1-M4 shows all paid, M5 shows invoiced status. public_civic template correctly applied. CLABE/bank placeholder is expected in test environment (non-blocking). No auto-fail conditions triggered — invoice amount matches payment schedule, payment instructions present (with placeholder), no pre-trigger timing issue.
celia_routing_notes: Controller dispatches Tax at final milestone (not Vera). tax-filing.json: dispatched_by=Controller. Confirmed per KVP-7 in run-summary. Correct chain per agent protocol.
